result:
All facts are verified against the source. Here is the complete, cited inventory:

---

## oCMS Cache Layer Inventory

### Layer 1 — `SimpleCache` (base in-memory store)

**Owner:** `internal/cache/cache.go:13–50`

A `sync.Map`-backed entry store with per-entry TTL and atomic hit/miss counters. Every domain cache in the `internal/cache/` package embeds one for stats tracking.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None — configured by containing layer | — |
| TTL | Per-entry; set by callers | `cache.go:44–50` |
| Invalidation | `Delete(key)`, `DeleteByPrefix(prefix)`, `Clear()`, TTL expiry; optional background cleanup goroutine started by `StartCleanup(interval)` | `cache.go:113–127` |
| Consumers | All six domain caches; `Manager.General` | `manager.go:44–79` |

---

### Layer 2 — `Manager.General` (`SimpleCache`, miscellaneous data)

**Owner:** `internal/cache/manager.go:51`, constructed in `NewManager` at `manager.go:72`

A freestanding `SimpleCache` for arbitrary short-lived data that doesn't fit the domain caches.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **5 min** (hardcoded `5 * time.Minute`) | `manager.go:72` |
| Cleanup interval | 1 min background goroutine started in `Manager.Start()` | `manager.go:122` |
| Invalidation | `Manager.General.Clear()` (called by `ClearAll()`) | `manager.go:168` |
| Consumers | Anything calling `Manager.General.Get/Set` | — |

---

### Layer 3 — `ConfigCache`

**Owner:** `internal/cache/config.go:17–198`

Lazy-loads the entire `configs` table into `map[string]store.Config` on first access; never expires by TTL alone — only manual invalidation.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **1 h** (hardcoded `time.Hour`), but effectively infinite until invalidated | `config.go:31` |
| Invalidation | `ConfigCache.Invalidate()` → `loaded = false`, full reload on next read; called by `Manager.ClearAll()` and `Manager.InvalidateConfig()` | `config.go:165`, `manager.go:162, 195` |
| Trigger points | Config/settings save (`/admin/config`), theme settings save, admin "clear config cache" button (`POST /admin/cache/clear/config`) | — |
| Consumers | Frontend rendering (robots, theme settings), admin config handlers, middleware | — |

---

### Layer 4 — `SitemapCache`

**Owner:** `internal/cache/sitemap.go:17–168`

Stores raw sitemap XML bytes (`[]byte`) along with the site URL it was built for and its generation timestamp. TTL checked inline on every read (`time.Since(cachedAt) < ttl`).

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **1 h** (passed as `time.Hour` from `NewManager`) | `manager.go:67`, `sitemap.go:31–34` |
| Invalidation | `SitemapCache.Invalidate()` zeroes `xml` field; called by `Manager.ClearAll()` and `Manager.InvalidateSitemap()` | `sitemap.go:123`, `manager.go:163` |
| Trigger points | Page, category, tag create/update/delete → sitemap auto-regenerates on next `GET /sitemap.xml` request | — |
| Consumers | `GET /sitemap.xml` in `handler/frontend.go:1483–1484` | — |

---

### Layer 5 — `MenuCache`

**Owner:** `internal/cache/menus.go:22–190`

Lazy-loads all menus and their items (with joined page slugs) into `map[string]*MenuWithItems` keyed by slug. No TTL-based expiry — relies entirely on explicit invalidation.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **1 h** (`time.Hour`), but `loaded` flag means it's never re-fetched unless invalidated | `menus.go:36` |
| Invalidation | `MenuCache.Invalidate()` → `loaded = false`; called by `Manager.ClearAll()` and `Manager.InvalidateMenus()` | `menus.go:157`, `manager.go:164` |
| Trigger points | Menu/menu-item create, update, delete; admin "clear menus cache" button | — |
| Consumers | `MenuService.GetMenu()` → `service/menu.go:54–58`; frontend template rendering | `service/menu.go:30–58` |

---

### Layer 6 — `LanguageCache`

**Owner:** `internal/cache/languages.go:14–220`

Lazy-loads all rows from the `languages` table into three projections: `[]store.Language` (all), `[]store.Language` (active), `map[string]store.Language` (by code), plus a default-language pointer.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **1 h** (`time.Hour`), loaded once and never re-fetched unless invalidated | `languages.go:31` |
| Invalidation | `LanguageCache.Invalidate()` → `loaded = false`; called by `Manager.ClearAll()` and `Manager.InvalidateLanguages()` | `languages.go:190`, `manager.go:165` |
| Trigger points | Language create, update, delete; admin "clear languages cache" button | — |
| Consumers | Middleware (language detection and context setup), frontend locale switching | — |

---

### Layer 7 — `TranslationCache`

**Owner:** `internal/cache/translations.go:26–273`

Stores translation mappings as a nested map `map[entityType]map[entityID]map[langCode]translatedID`. Has capacity-based eviction (evicts ~50% when `maxEntries` is reached) in addition to TTL.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **30 min** (hardcoded `30 * time.Minute`) | `translations.go:41, 44` |
| Max entries | **10,000** (hardcoded) | `translations.go:45` |
| Invalidation | `Invalidate()` (full clear), `InvalidateType(entityType)`, `InvalidateEntity(entityType, entityID)`; capacity eviction evicts ~50% randomly; called by `Manager.ClearAll()` and `Manager.InvalidateTranslations()` | `translations.go:236, 245, 252`, `manager.go:166` |
| Trigger points | Page/category/tag language-link create or delete | — |
| Consumers | Page rendering (alternate-language variant lookup); API v2 pages service | — |

---

### Layer 8 — `PageCache`

**Owner:** `internal/cache/pages.go:16–231`

Context-aware page cache keyed as `{lang}:{role}:{slug}` and `{lang}:{role}:{id}`. Maintains a reverse index `map[int64][]string` (pageID → all cache keys) for precise per-page invalidation.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **1 h** (`time.Hour`), but invalidated on every page change | `pages.go:35` |
| Invalidation | `InvalidatePage(pageID)` (all lang/role variants), `InvalidateBySlug(slug)`, `Invalidate()` (full clear); called by `Manager.ClearAll()` and `Manager.InvalidatePage()` | `pages.go:116, 137, 170` |
| Trigger points | Page create, update, delete (admin handler + API v2); admin "clear pages cache" button | — |
| Consumers | `FrontendHandler.Page()` (slug lookup), `FrontendHandler.PageByID()` (ID lookup) | — |

---

### Layer 9 — Distributed Cache (optional Redis)

**Owner:** `internal/cache/manager.go:82–101` (setup); Redis adapter presumably in `internal/cache/redis.go`

Plugged in as `Manager.Distributed Cache` when `OCMS_REDIS_URL` is set. All domain caches are in-memory only; the `Distributed` field is used for explicit get/set on data that spans multiple oCMS instances.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | `OCMS_REDIS_URL` (no default = memory only), `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX` (default `"ocms:"`), `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` (default `3600` s), `OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE` (default `10000`) | `config.go:36–39` |
| TTL | `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` seconds (default **3600 s / 1 h**) | `config.go:38` |
| Invalidation | `Manager.Distributed.Clear(ctx)`; prefix-scan delete on Redis; automatic fallback to memory if Redis unavailable at startup | `manager.go:170–178`, `manager.go:93–97` |
| Health check | `Manager.HealthCheck()` pings Redis; admin dashboard shows backend type and fallback status | `manager.go:145–158` |
| Consumers | Any code explicitly calling `Manager.Distributed.Get/Set`; `ClearAll()` also flushes it | `manager.go:161–178` |

---

### Layer 10 — `WidgetService` in-process cache

**Owner:** `internal/service/widget.go:36–68`

Plain `map[string][]WidgetView` protected by `sync.RWMutex`. Uses a single shared `lastExp` timestamp for the whole map (not per-key), so all widget data expires together.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | None | — |
| TTL | **5 min** (hardcoded `5 * time.Minute`) | `widget.go:50` |
| Cache key | `"{theme}:{area}:{languageCode}"` | `widget.go:55–57` |
| Invalidation | TTL expiry (entire map checked via `time.Since(s.lastExp) < s.ttl`); no explicit invalidation hook on widget edits — must wait for TTL | `widget.go:65` |
| Consumers | Frontend theme rendering for widget areas | — |

---

### Layer 11 — `Renderer` template cache (admin UI)

**Owner:** `internal/render/render.go:69–78`

A `map[string]*template.Template` populated at startup. No TTL. In development mode (`isDev = true`) templates are reloaded on each request.

| Item | Detail | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Env vars | `OCMS_ENV` — when `"development"`, templates reload per-request | `config.go:28` |
| TTL | None — process lifetime; or per-request in dev mode | `render.go:69–78` |
| Invalidation | Only by restarting the process (production); automatic per-request reload in dev mode | — |
| Consumers | All admin UI HTTP responses | — |

---

### Layer 12 — HTTP `Cache-Control` response headers (client-side)

**Owner:** `internal/handler/frontend.go` (multiple routes); `internal/middleware/cache.go`

These are browser/proxy caches — oCMS sets them but doesn't control eviction.

| Route | Header value | Source line |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /sitemap.xml` | `public, max-age=3600` | `frontend.go:1497` |
| `GET /robots.txt` | `public, max-age=86400` | `frontend.go:1596` |
| `GET /.well-known/security.txt` | `public, max-age=86400` | `frontend.go:1647` |
| `GET /.well-known/webfinger` | `public, max-age=3600` | `frontend.go:1662` |
| `GET /manifest.json` | `public, max-age=3600` | `frontend.go:1679` |
| `GET /opensearch.xml` | `public, max-age=3600` | `frontend.go:1701` |
| `GET /favicon.ico` | `public, max-age=31536000` | `frontend.go:2897` |
| Dynamic 404 / error pages | `no-store` | `frontend.go:1474, 2596` |

---

### Env-var reference summary

| Env var | Default | Controls |
|---|---|---|
| `OCMS_REDIS_URL` | _(empty — memory only)_ | Enables distributed Redis backend |
| `OCMS_CACHE_PREFIX` | `"ocms:"` | Redis key namespace prefix |
| `OCMS_CACHE_TTL` | `3600` | Default TTL (seconds) for distributed cache entries |
| `OCMS_CACHE_MAX_SIZE` | `10000` | Max entries for distributed / in-process caches |
| `OCMS_ENV` | `"development"` | Enables per-request template reload in Renderer |

All domain caches (`ConfigCache`, `SitemapCache`, `MenuCache`, `LanguageCache`, `TranslationCache`, `PageCache`, `WidgetService`) have **hardcoded** TTLs and are **not configurable via env vars**.
